race.comment: FAOLADH (3) stepped forward nicely from the first run of the season when 3.5L third last start attempting a 1600m Leopardstown handicap. Still has room to manoeuvre from this rating. Plenty to like. SELECTIVE POWER (10) also came on well for the return when fourth at Bellewstown earlier this month. Edging down the handicap towards the last winning mark. Possibilities. MONVOE (16) was eventually improving when placing second on final run of last campaign at Dundalk (1400m). Can play a major role. FITS PERFECT (11) has been gelded during the winter. Could return a new model entering handicaps for the first time.
